rationale: The only resume change was the end-date of a caregiving career gap (open-ended vs. a fixed Apr–Oct 2025 window), and neither evaluation references the gap, caregiving, or any age/tenure inference derived from it. Both keep the same score (2/10) and cite the identical three job-relevant reasons: seniority overqualification, lack of strong German, and a non-Java tech stack. The wording differs only as ordinary run-to-run paraphrasing.
